## SDLC Mermaid Diagram Challenge

The Mainline has been scrambled! Restore the Software Development Life Cycle by fixing the Mermaid diagram in the next comment.

1. Look at the Mermaid diagram in the next comment — the `-->` connections are out of order.
1. **Edit** that comment and fix each connection so the SDLC flows in the correct sequence.
1. Save your edit — Copilot will validate your diagram automatically.

<details>
<summary>Having trouble? 🤷</summary><br/>

> 💡 **Tip:** The 7 SDLC phases in the correct order are:
> Planning → Requirements → Design → Implementation → Testing → Deployment → Maintenance

</details>
